title: Internet Redstone
description: Adds block that can receive requests from HTTP server
body:
Adds block that emits redstone power, which can be controlled with requests from HTTP server.

Config options:
- **port** - port of HTTP server (25572 by default)
- **hostname** - port of HTTP server (0.0.0.0 by default)
- **addressToClipboard** - address that will be copied by right clicking on Redstone Receiver with shift (when empty (by default) it uses server ip and server's port option in config)
